## What does this PR do?
A clear description of the change and why it's needed.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Consensus impact
- [ ] This touches consensus-critical code (GenesisConfig, blockchain rules, UBI logic, verification)
- [ ] This is non-breaking / additive only

## Testing
How did you test this? What should reviewers check?

```bash
# Steps to verify the change works
```

## Checklist
- [ ] Change is focused — one fix or feature per PR
- [ ] I've described the consensus impact above
- [ ] I've tested against a running node
- [ ] Code follows the project's style (2-space indent, BigInt for amounts)
